meaning: adj.阿兹特克人的,阿兹特克语的
examples: This is the pride of the Aztecan.
These are Indo-European, Bantu, Austronesian (from South-East Asia and the Pacific) and Uto-Aztecan (the native vernaculars of the Americas).
Humans and Norn both live in pretty bland high-fantasy settings, but the Asura inhabit a high-tech, high-magic region replete with cool, almost Aztecan structures.
